parameters.name: response_type
parameters.description: Must be `code` for the authorization code flow

parameters.name: redirect_uri
parameters.description: The URI to redirect the user back to after authorization

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: An opaque value used to prevent CSRF attacks. Will be returned in the callback.

parameters.name: nonce
parameters.description: A random value to associate the ID token with the client session
